data.body:
## Additional Scope: Project Structure, Temp Files, Orphan Processes, and Orphan Worktrees

Beyond plugin installation health, /dso:doctor should also validate:

### 11. Project Structure Validation
- .claude/dso-config.conf exists and is parseable with all referenced paths valid
- .claude/scripts/dso shim exists and is executable
- .tickets-tracker/ worktree is mounted and on the tickets branch
- .test-index exists and all referenced source/test paths are valid
- CLAUDE.md exists and contains expected DSO sections
- Design documents are in plugins/dso/docs/designs/ (not bare designs/ at repo root)

### 12. Temp File Cleanup
- /tmp/merge-to-main-state-*.json — stale state files (>4h TTL) should be flagged for cleanup
- /tmp/merge-to-main-lock-* — orphaned lock files from interrupted merges
- /tmp/preplanning-context-*.json — expired context files (>24h) should be flagged
- /tmp/dso-blackboard-* — stale blackboard directories from completed sprints
- /tmp/dso-debug-lock-* — orphaned debug session locks

### 13. Orphan Process Detection
- Detect orphaned Claude sub-agent processes that outlived their parent session
- Detect orphaned Chroma/vector DB processes if claude-mem or similar is installed
- Detect orphaned Playwright browser instances from design review or staging checks
- Report PID, age, and command for each orphan; offer cleanup

### 14. Orphan Worktree Detection
- List all git worktrees and check each for:
  - Is the branch merged to main? (safe to remove)
  - Is the working tree clean? (no uncommitted changes)
  - Is the worktree stale? (no commits in >7 days)
- Flag worktrees that are merged+clean as safe to remove
- Flag worktrees with uncommitted changes as needing attention
- Flag stale worktrees as candidates for review
- Do NOT auto-remove — report only, with suggested cleanup commands

### 15. Config Coherence
- Verify dso-config.conf values match actual project state (e.g., test_gate.test_dirs points to directories that exist, ci.workflow_name matches a file in .github/workflows/)
- Check for deprecated config keys and suggest migration
- Validate that referenced scripts (format, lint, test commands) are executable
